title: Erepsia aristata
taxonomy: Erepsia aristata is classified within the family Aizoaceae. This classification places it within the order Caryophyllales. Erepsia aristata is a flowering plant native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. It is a succulent plant, which contributes to its classification in the Aizoaceae family. The Aizoaceae family is also known as the ice plant family.
uses: Erepsia aristata.
